calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-10-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Judge: Ollie Marie Victoire, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Floyd Butler. Petitioners Eric Antonio Islas and Rosa Ortiz Cruz weres sworn and examined. The Court grants the Decree changing names to Eric Antonio Islas-Ortiz and Rosa Islas-Ortiz. Decree signed in open court.
